description: BIMGUARD AI compliance ruleset for Microbially Influenced Corrosion (MIC) in MEP building services pipework. Covers dead-leg stagnation, Legionella risk temperature zones, under-insulation corrosion, and biofilm susceptibility by material and system type.
standards_referenced: CIBSE TM13:2013 — Minimising the Risk of Legionella
HSE HSG274 Part 1 — Evaporative Cooling Systems
HSE HSG274 Part 2 — Hot and Cold Water Systems
HSE HSG274 Part 3 — Other Risk Systems
BS 8552:2012 — Sampling and Monitoring of Water Systems
ASTM G-187 — Standard Practice for Measurement of Soil Resistivity
EN ISO 9308-1 — Water Quality Microbiological Methods
WHO Guidelines for Drinking Water Quality 4th Ed. (2011)
NACCE TPC 11 — MIC in Industrial Water Systems
NACE SP0198 — Control of Corrosion Under Thermal Insulation
CIBSE Guide G — Public Health Engineering

scoring_model.under_insulation_pathway: If under-insulation risk × 0.85 > modified score, UIC pathway score used instead (worst-case of two independent pathways)
scoring_model.rationale: Flow velocity receives highest weight (0.35) because stagnation is the necessary precondition for all MIC mechanisms — without stagnation, biofilms cannot establish at scale. Temperature receives 0.30 because it determines which microbial communities are active and whether Legionella proliferation is possible. Dead-leg geometry receives 0.25 as the structural enabler of stagnation. Material susceptibility receives 0.10 because it modifies the consequence of biofilm establishment but does not prevent it.

Low.bcf_action: Record in asset register — no BCF issue

Medium.bcf_action: BCF Normal priority — schedule monitoring programme

High.bcf_action: BCF Major priority — remediation required within 3 months

Critical.bcf_action: BCF Critical priority — immediate remediation or shutdown required

SRB.name: Sulphate-Reducing Bacteria
SRB.flow_preference: Anaerobic — stagnant or very low flow
SRB.corrosion_mechanism: Hydrogen sulphide production under biofilm — aggressive pitting of carbon steel and cast iron. Forms iron sulphide (FeS) corrosion product.

IOB.name: Iron-Oxidising Bacteria
IOB.flow_preference: Aerobic zones — low flow allows oxygen stratification
IOB.corrosion_mechanism: Creates differential aeration cells — accelerated pitting at aerobic/anaerobic interfaces. Tubercle formation restricts flow.

APB.name: Acid-Producing Bacteria
APB.flow_preference: Biofilm — can be aerobic or anaerobic
APB.corrosion_mechanism: Organic acid production lowers local pH — destroys passive films on stainless steel grades. Enables pitting initiation below normal CCT.

Legionella.name: Legionella pneumophila
Legionella.flow_preference: Stagnant warm water — dead-legs and low-use outlets
Legionella.corrosion_mechanism: Not a direct corrosion agent — health hazard through inhalation of contaminated aerosol. Biofilm forms on pipe scale and corrosion products.

DOMESTICCOLDWATER.rationale: Primary Legionella risk system — CIBSE TM13 mandatory risk assessment

DOMESTICHOTWATER.rationale: Legionella proliferation if distribution temperature < 55°C — HSE HSG274 Part 2

CONDENSERWATER.rationale: Warm recirculating system — high MIC risk — HSE HSG274 Part 1

CHILLEDWATER.rationale: 7–12°C chilled water — biofilm active, low flow zones at risk

FIREPROTECTION.rationale: Infrequent / zero flow — highest dead-leg stagnation risk — HSE HSG274 Part 3

IRRIGATION.rationale: Intermittent flow — warm conditions in summer

WASTEWATER.rationale: Anaerobic SRB active but Legionella consequence lower

PROCESSWATER.rationale: Risk depends on operating conditions — no modifier

UNKNOWN.rationale: Conservative uplift for unknown system type

mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-001: Eliminate dead-leg — reconfigure pipework to active through-flow configuration (HSE HSG274 preferred solution)
mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-002: Install automatic flushing device — programme to flush weekly at minimum (CIBSE TM13 requirement)
mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-003: Increase design flow velocity to minimum 0.3 m/s — revise pipe sizing or reroute to reduce network length
mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-004: Raise hot water storage and distribution temperature to minimum 60°C storage / 55°C at outlets (HSE HSG274 Part 2)
mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-005: Reduce cold water temperature to below 20°C — review insulation against heat gain from adjacent services
mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-006: Specify copper or CPVC pipework in replacement — antimicrobial material substitution
mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-007: Repair or replace damaged/wet insulation — prevent under-insulation moisture accumulation
mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-008: Implement biocide dosing programme — chlorination or alternative biocide per BS 8552
mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-009: Introduce microbiological monitoring programme — EN ISO 9308-1 sampling at identified risk points
mitigation_catalogue.MIT-MIC-010: Conduct thermal disinfection — pasteurisation at minimum 70°C for 1 hour (CIBSE TM13 emergency response)

properties.name: MICRiskBand
properties.description: Risk band: Low / Medium / High / Critical

properties.name: FlowVelocityClass
properties.description: Flow velocity classification per CIBSE TM13

properties.name: TemperatureClass
properties.description: Temperature risk class per CIBSE TM13 / HSE HSG274

properties.name: DeadLegClass
properties.description: Dead-leg geometry classification per HSE HSG274

properties.name: RecommendedMitigation
properties.description: Pipe-separated list of mitigation codes from MC-001 catalogue

high_risk_configurations.description: Domestic hot water dead-leg at Legionella danger zone temperature
high_risk_configurations.reference: HSE HSG274 Part 2 — hot water dead-legs

high_risk_configurations.description: Fire suppression system — effectively permanent dead-leg
high_risk_configurations.reference: HSE HSG274 Part 3 — infrequent use systems

high_risk_configurations.description: Chilled water system with under-insulation wet condition
Domestic cold water storage — temperature above 20°C due to heat gain
high_risk_configurations.reference: CIBSE TM13 — cold water storage risk

high_risk_configurations.description: Condenser water warm loop with low recirculation
high_risk_configurations.reference: HSE HSG274 Part 1 — evaporative cooling systems

dead_leg_length: Calculated from IfcDistributionSystem topology — distance from last active junction to terminal
